rulings.Case Title: WONG VS THRIFTY CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Amended; Notice Of Motion And Motion
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER $43,750.00 AS REASONABLE FEES (175 HOURS @$250.00/HR). COURT DOES NOT PERMIT RECOVERY FOR MOTION FOR SANCTIONS, MOTION TO RECALL REMITTITUR, RESEARCH RE DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL'S BILLING RATE AND OTHER UNNECESSARY WORK. PLAINTIFF CAN RECOVER FOR OPPOSING THE MOTION TO VACATE, FILING A MOTION FOR FEES, EX PARTE APPLICATION, FILING A MOTION TO VACATE THE STAY, AND CORRESPONDENCE. PLAINTIFF CAN RECOVER $69 IN FILING FEES AND $487.50 IN MESSENGER FEES. COURT STRIKES $1,315.75 FOR PHOTOCOPIES. (302/AJR/PB)
